hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; [ -f "$FILE" ] || exit 0; case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.astro|*.js|*.jsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; npx prettier --write "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; OUT=$(npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1) || { echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; };; *.json|*.css|*.md) npx prettier --write "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac
